description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow with a hip roof and a modest, rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown brick, and the roof is a muted gray, sloping gently on all sides. Large, white-framed windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A small driveway with a parked car and green hedges leads up to the main entrance, which features a white door and a paved walkway. The house includes a side extension with additional windows and a secondary entrance, enhancing its functional layout. The overall design is simple and practical, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a hip roof, large white-framed windows, and a driveway with a parked car and hedges. The design is symmetrical and practical, suited for suburban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway, parked car, green hedges, and a row of large windows along the brick wall.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the hip roof, a set of double glass doors, and a small rear extension.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the driveway and car visible, as well as a secondary entrance and more windows.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance door, symmetrical windows, driveway, and landscaped hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
